services.title: SAP Services
services.shortDescription: End-to-end SAP delivery from advisory to go-live — implementation, migration, and long-term managed services across the full SAP catalog.
services.headline: End-to-End SAP Delivery, From Advisory to Go-Live and Beyond
services.bodyParagraph1: Whether you're rolling out SAP for the first time, planning your move to S/4HANA, or looking for a partner who can keep your existing SAP landscape running smoothly — Proximsoft handles the full lifecycle. Our SAP-certified consultants have deployed real systems for real businesses across banking, retail, manufacturing, and healthcare. We work across the entire SAP catalog — Digital Core, CX, SuccessFactors, Ariba, Concur, BTP, and Business Analytics — so whatever modules you run, you get one accountable partner who understands how the pieces fit together.
bullets: SAP S/4HANA Cloud and On-Premise — implementation, migration, and conversion
SAP CX, SuccessFactors, Ariba, Concur, and Fieldglass — full deployment and support
Built on the SAP Activate methodology — proven, predictable, audit-ready
Long-term Application Managed Services (AMS) for stable, post-launch operations

capabilities.description: We answer the strategic questions before touching a single configuration — S/4HANA Cloud vs. on-premise, greenfield vs. brownfield, which modules first, what to retire. Output: a board-ready roadmap with clear cost ranges, timelines, and risk paths.

End-to-end deployment of S/4HANA, Business One, ByDesign, SuccessFactors, Ariba, Concur, and the full CX suite — SAP Activate methodology from Discover through Run, with named senior consultants accountable at every phase.

ECC to S/4HANA is our deepest specialty. We handle every path — system conversion, selective data transition, or new implementation — including custom code remediation, business partner conversion, and the move to the simplified S/4HANA data model.

Technical and functional system conversions to S/4HANA that preserve years of historical data and custom logic — modernizing the platform without disrupting the business-critical reporting your teams depend on daily.

S/4HANA release cycles, Enhancement Packs, Support Packs, kernel upgrades, and Fiori modernizations — every upgrade is rehearsed through a complete cycle in your QA environment before a single change touches production.

SAP-to-Salesforce, Oracle, Microsoft, and B2B integrations with suppliers, distributors, and banks — built natively on SAP Integration Suite (CPI), Process Orchestration (PO), and the Extension Suite.

Application Managed Services covering L1 through L4 — incident response, root-cause analysis, enhancement requests, performance tuning, and 24/7 production stability with predictable SLAs and transparent monthly reporting.

Multi-country and multi-entity rollouts of standardized SAP templates — with full localization for tax regimes, statutory reporting formats, and regulatory compliance across every region you operate in.

services.bodyParagraph2: Our SAP team brings more than ten years of cumulative delivery experience. Every project starts with a clear scope, fixed milestones, and senior people on the ground from day one. No outsourced juniors. No surprise change orders. Just SAP done right — at a cost typically 30 to 40 percent below the big-firm benchmark.

testimonial.quote: We'd already burned six months and a serious chunk of budget with another firm before we found Proximsoft. They scoped the work tightly, hit every milestone, and stayed on after launch to fine-tune the small things. Smoothest enterprise rollout we've ever run.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: VP, Information Technology

services.title: Oracle Services
services.shortDescription: Database administration, performance tuning, and full Oracle Cloud migrations — from EBS and JD Edwards to Fusion Cloud Applications.
services.headline: Modernize Your Oracle Stack with Confidence
services.bodyParagraph1: From database administration and performance tuning to full Oracle Cloud Infrastructure migrations, Proximsoft delivers Oracle services that move your business forward — not sideways. We help enterprises get more from their existing Oracle investments and plan the move to cloud-native platforms when the timing makes sense. Whether you're running Oracle E-Business Suite, JD Edwards, PeopleSoft, or Fusion Cloud Applications, our certified consultants bring the depth and discipline your Oracle environment deserves.
bullets: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) migration, architecture, and managed services
Oracle E-Business Suite, JD Edwards, and PeopleSoft implementation and support
Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications — Finance, HCM, SCM, and CX
Database administration, performance tuning, and 24/7 production support

capabilities.description: An honest landscape assessment across your EBS, JDE, PeopleSoft, Siebel, and standalone database environments — followed by a phased modernization roadmap that balances cost, risk, and your actual business priorities.
Full implementation of Oracle Fusion Cloud — Finance (ERP), HCM, SCM, and CX — plus on-premise EBS, JDE, and PeopleSoft for enterprises with specific compliance or data sovereignty requirements.
Oracle workload migration to OCI, AWS, or Azure — database, applications, and middleware — with parallel-run validation cycles so your finance team stays confident all the way through cutover.
Database version conversions from 12c to 19c to 23ai, schema modernization, and application re-architecture from legacy Forms-and-Reports to Oracle APEX or modern cloud-native frameworks.
Oracle EBS R12 upgrades, JDE upgrade paths, Oracle Database upgrades with minimal downtime, and quarterly Fusion Cloud release management including impact assessment and regression testing.
Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) and SOA Suite connecting Oracle environments to Salesforce, SAP, ServiceNow, and downstream analytics platforms via REST, SOAP, and purpose-built APIs.
24/7 DBA services covering performance tuning, backup and recovery, patching, and Real Application Clusters (RAC) management — available as continuous AMS or targeted support engagements.
Multi-entity Fusion Cloud rollouts with localization, currency configurations, and statutory reporting setups for organizations operating across multiple regulatory jurisdictions simultaneously.

services.bodyParagraph2: We approach every Oracle engagement the same way — start with a working assessment, agree on a clean scope, deliver in phases, and validate against business KPIs. The result is an Oracle environment that runs faster, costs less, and stays predictable through every release cycle.

testimonial.quote: Our Oracle estate had grown messy over a decade of acquisitions. Proximsoft mapped it in two weeks, built a phased migration plan, and executed without a single production outage. We came out the other side with a cleaner architecture and noticeably lower cloud costs.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: Chief Information Officer

services.title: Salesforce Services
services.shortDescription: Sales, Service, Marketing, Commerce, and CPQ — plus the Salesforce-to-SAP integration expertise few partners can match.
services.headline: A CRM Is Only As Useful As the Systems It Connects To
services.bodyParagraph1: Salesforce is powerful — but it only delivers when it's set up correctly and connected cleanly to the rest of your business. Proximsoft brings ten years of Salesforce delivery experience across Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Commerce Cloud, and CPQ. We're also one of the few partners that genuinely specializes in Salesforce-to-SAP integration — so your sales, service, finance, and operations teams finally share a single view of every customer.
bullets: Sales, Service, Marketing, Commerce, and CPQ Cloud implementation
Salesforce-to-SAP integration with clean two-way data sync
Custom Salesforce development, Lightning components, and Apex
Ongoing admin support, optimization, and managed services

capabilities.description: Cloud strategy across Sales, Service, Marketing, Commerce, Experience, and Field Service — plus licensing optimization and integration architecture to prevent over-customization, license sprawl, and underused features.

Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Commerce Cloud, Experience Cloud, Field Service, Health Cloud, Financial Services Cloud, CPQ, and Revenue Cloud — sprint-based delivery with bi-weekly working demos.

Migration from legacy CRMs — Dynamics, SAP CRM, Siebel, HubSpot, Zoho — to Salesforce, including historical data preservation, field mapping, Classic-to-Lightning transitions, and end-user retraining.

Legacy custom code converted to Lightning Web Components, Aura-to-LWC migrations, and Process Builder and Workflow Rules converted to modern Flow architecture ahead of Salesforce's deprecation roadmap.

Triannual release management — Spring, Summer, and Winter — including impact assessment, regression testing, and proactive feature adoption planning so your team captures every release's upside without disruption.

Salesforce-to-SAP, Oracle, and Microsoft integrations via MuleSoft, native APIs, and direct connectors — two-way sync, identity federation, and event-driven architectures for real-time customer experiences.

Managed Services covering admin support, development backlogs, security review, license optimization, and continuous improvement — from fractional admin coverage to fully dedicated Center of Excellence teams.
Global template rollouts across multi-country, multi-BU organizations — localization, multi-currency configuration, and full regulatory compliance including GDPR, CCPA, and HIPAA.

services.bodyParagraph2: We treat Salesforce as a business platform, not a software project. That means starting with the workflows that actually drive revenue, configuring the system around how your team really sells and serves, and skipping the features that look impressive in a demo but never get used.

testimonial.quote: Proximsoft connected our Salesforce platform to SAP in about ten weeks — work we'd been quoted six months for elsewhere. The team explained every decision in plain English, and the cost was a fraction of what the bigger names had pitched.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: Director of Operations

services.title: Data Science Services
services.shortDescription: From data engineering and warehousing to advanced analytics and self-service BI — turn unused enterprise data into decision-grade intelligence.
services.headline: You Have the Data. We Help You Decide What to Do With It.
services.bodyParagraph1: Most enterprises have years of customer, operational, and financial data sitting unused across disconnected systems. Proximsoft turns that data into clear, decision-grade intelligence. From data engineering and warehousing to advanced analytics and self-service BI, our data scientists and engineers help you stop reporting backward and start steering forward — with dashboards your executives actually open and forecasts your operators actually trust.
bullets: Big data engineering, data lake, and warehouse architecture
Predictive analytics, forecasting models, and statistical modeling
Power BI, Tableau, and SAP Analytics Cloud — design, deployment, governance
Real-time dashboards and executive KPI reporting

capabilities.description: Data strategy, governance frameworks, modern architecture design, and technology selection across Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, and Datasphere — building operating models designed to scale with your business.
Cloud data warehouse and lakehouse deployment, ETL/ELT pipeline construction, master data management, and end-to-end BI platform rollout on Power BI, Tableau, Looker, or SAP Analytics Cloud.

Legacy on-premise warehouse migrations — Teradata, Netezza, Oracle Exadata, SAP BW — to modern cloud platforms with schema modernization, ETL re-engineering, historical backfill, and parallel-run validation.

Legacy stored procedures, SAS code, and SQL Server packages converted to cloud-native frameworks (dbt, Spark, Airflow) — and static operational reports converted to interactive, governed, live dashboards.
BI environment modernization — Power BI Pro to Premium, Tableau Server to Cloud, SAP BW to Datasphere — with backward compatibility preserved so executive reporting continuity is never broken.

Real-time data integration across SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, and operational systems using Fivetran, Stitch, Kafka, and CDC connectors — plus reverse ETL to push insights back into the tools your teams already use.
Data platform managed services — pipeline monitoring, query optimization, cost governance, dashboard maintenance, and continuous data quality remediation with predictable response SLAs.
Enterprise-wide self-service analytics rollouts including data literacy programs, governed semantic layers, certified dataset frameworks, and federated governance models for global organizations.

services.bodyParagraph2: We build data programs that survive contact with the real world — pragmatic models, clear governance, and dashboards designed for the people who'll actually use them. No black-box algorithms. No 200-page reports nobody reads. Just data that earns its keep.

testimonial.quote: We had data everywhere and insight nowhere. Proximsoft consolidated five sources into one warehouse, built three executive dashboards, and trained our team in eight weeks. We finally stopped guessing in board meetings.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: Chief Financial Officer

services.title: AI & Machine Learning
services.shortDescription: RPA, generative AI, computer vision, and conversational AI — deployed against real bottlenecks with measurable ROI inside six months.
services.headline: AI That Solves Real Problems — Not Demos That Look Good in Slides
services.bodyParagraph1: Most enterprise AI projects stall because they were started by technology teams and ignored by the business. Proximsoft does it the other way around. We start with the bottlenecks slowing your operations down — repetitive manual work, slow document processing, customer service backlogs — and design AI and machine learning solutions that produce measurable results inside three to six months. From robotic process automation to natural language processing, computer vision, and generative AI, our team builds tools your people actually use.
bullets: Robotic Process Automation (RPA) — UiPath, Automation Anywhere, SAP iRPA
Generative AI and large language model integration for enterprise workflows
Computer vision for quality control, document processing, and security
Conversational AI, chatbots, and intelligent customer service automation

capabilities.description: AI opportunity assessments, ROI modeling, ethics and governance frameworks, and pragmatic 12-month roadmaps — prioritizing where automation will pay back fastest before a single line of code is written.
End-to-end deployment of RPA platforms (UiPath, Automation Anywhere, SAP iRPA, Power Automate), LLM applications using OpenAI and Anthropic models, computer vision pipelines, and conversational AI.

Legacy automation platform migrations — Blue Prism to UiPath, on-premise to cloud-native — and ML model migrations from local notebooks to production MLOps platforms (MLflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI, Databricks).

Macro-driven and screen-scraping automations converted to robust API-based RPA — and rule-based workflows converted to AI-augmented intelligent automation that handles exceptions and improves over time.

Continuous model lifecycle management — retraining cycles, prompt engineering refinement, RPA platform version upgrades, and migration from earlier GenAI generations to current state-of-the-art alternatives.

AI services integrated with SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, and ServiceNow — including event-driven pipelines, intelligent document understanding workflows, and AI agents embedded inside core business processes.

AI Managed Services — bot monitoring, model drift detection, prompt optimization, hallucination guardrails for LLMs, and continuous model improvement through retraining cycles and structured feedback loops.
Enterprise AI Center of Excellence design — governance frameworks, citizen-developer enablement, and reusable AI component libraries for organizations scaling automation across business units.

services.bodyParagraph2: We design AI engagements like business projects — clear ROI targets, fast prototypes, measurable rollouts. Most clients see automation paybacks within twelve months. The rest see them within eighteen. Either way, you'll know exactly what you're getting before we write a line of code.

testimonial.quote: We brought Proximsoft in to automate our claims intake — six analysts spending half their day on manual data entry. Eight weeks later, the bots handle 78 percent of the volume and our team is finally working on the cases that need real judgment.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: VP, Operations

services.title: Application Development
services.shortDescription: Custom enterprise applications built in tight agile sprints — microservices, API-first, cloud-native, with clear demos every two weeks.
services.headline: When Off-the-Shelf Doesn't Fit, We Build Software That Does
services.bodyParagraph1: Some workflows are too specific, too strategic, or too unique to fit any packaged software. That's where custom application development earns its keep. Proximsoft builds enterprise-grade applications using modern, API-first architectures — from full microservices platforms to internal tools that simply solve a specific business problem. Our developers work in tight, agile sprints with clear demos every two weeks, so you see what you're getting before the bill arrives.
bullets: Custom enterprise application development — Java, .NET, Node.js, Python
Microservices architecture, API-first design, and cloud-native deployment
DevOps automation, CI/CD pipelines, and containerization with Docker and Kubernetes
Modernization of legacy applications and re-platforming to cloud

capabilities.description: Architecture reviews, stack selection, build-vs-buy analysis, portfolio rationalization, and modernization roadmaps — steering teams away from premature scaling, monolithic traps, and over-engineered platforms.

Full-stack development across Java, .NET, Node.js, Python, React, Angular, and Vue — built on microservices architectures, deployed to AWS, Azure, GCP, or on-premise based on your sovereignty and compliance needs.
On-premise to cloud, monolith to microservices, legacy frameworks (PHP, ColdFusion, classic ASP, VB6) to modern stacks — executed with zero-downtime cutover wherever the architecture allows it.

Legacy Forms-and-Reports, COBOL mainframe, and Visual Basic 6 applications converted to modern cloud-native architectures — monolithic codebases decomposed into containerized, independently deployable services.

Framework version upgrades (Java 8→21, .NET Framework→.NET 8+, Angular major versions, React class components to hooks), database upgrades, and continuous dependency management for security and performance.
REST, GraphQL, and gRPC API design, event-driven architectures using Kafka, third-party API wiring, OAuth/SAML/OIDC identity federation, and clean connectivity to SAP, Oracle, and Salesforce.
24/7 application managed services — bug fixes, security patching, performance tuning, infrastructure optimization, observability, incident response, and continuous improvement backlog management.
Multi-region deployment with active-active architectures, blue-green deployment patterns, feature flag rollout strategies, and global CDN configuration for low-latency access worldwide.

services.bodyParagraph2: We don't believe in big-bang launches. Every application we build ships in increments — useful from day thirty, complete by day ninety. That keeps risk low, lets your team adapt as priorities shift, and means the software is paying for itself long before it's officially "done."

testimonial.quote: We needed a custom underwriting platform built fast — eight weeks, no slippage. Proximsoft delivered it on day fifty-four. Their developers understood our domain better than we expected, and the code quality has held up beautifully a year later.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: Head of Product

services.title: Web, Portal & Mobile Apps
services.shortDescription: Modern websites, B2B portals, and native mobile apps — built with real engineering, real UX thinking, and full post-launch support.
services.headline: Customer-Facing Software Is Your Brand. We Build It Like It Matters.
services.bodyParagraph1: Your website, customer portal, and mobile app are often the first — and sometimes the only — interaction your customers have with you. They deserve real engineering, real design, and real UX thinking. Proximsoft builds modern websites, B2B and customer portals, and native and cross-platform mobile applications that load fast, look sharp, and stay reliable as your business scales. From discovery through design, build, launch, and post-launch support, we own the full delivery.
bullets: Modern websites and corporate portals — React, Next.js, headless CMS
Self-service customer portals, vendor portals, and partner portals
Native iOS and Android mobile apps + cross-platform with React Native and Flutter
Performance optimization, accessibility (WCAG), and ongoing managed support

capabilities.description: Digital experience strategy, stack selection (headless vs. traditional CMS, native vs. cross-platform), WCAG 2.2 and ADA accessibility roadmaps, and performance and SEO optimization strategy from the ground up.

Modern websites on React, Next.js, Vue, and headless CMS; B2B and self-service portals on enterprise or custom frameworks; native iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin) apps; cross-platform mobile with React Native and Flutter.

Legacy platforms (WordPress monoliths, Drupal, Sitecore, Adobe Experience Manager) migrated to modern composable architectures — with content migration, full URL preservation for SEO, and zero-downtime cutover.
Legacy hybrid mobile apps (Cordova, Ionic) converted to React Native or native implementations — and static brochure websites converted to dynamic, personalization-ready, data-driven experiences.
Continuous platform upgrades — React, Next.js, mobile OS SDK updates, accessibility audit cycles, performance optimization sprints, and ongoing Lighthouse and Core Web Vitals improvement programs.

CRM, CDP, commerce platforms (Salesforce Commerce, Shopify, SAP Commerce), payment gateways, identity providers (Okta, Auth0, Azure AD B2C), and analytics — all cleanly wired into the customer-facing layer.
Continuous managed services — security patching, performance monitoring, A/B test execution, content publishing support, mobile app store release management, and SLA-backed incident response.

Multi-region, multi-language, multi-brand rollouts with full internationalization, regional compliance (GDPR, CCPA, WCAG accessibility regulations), and federated content governance for global operations.

services.bodyParagraph2: We treat every front-end project the way a product team would — clear user research, lightweight prototypes, design that respects your brand, and engineering that respects your roadmap. The result is software your customers actually like using, and your team is genuinely proud to ship.

testimonial.quote: Our customer portal was eight years old and embarrassing. Proximsoft rebuilt it from scratch in fourteen weeks — clean design, proper mobile experience, real self-service. Customer support tickets dropped 40 percent in the first quarter after launch.
testimonial.name: Client Name
testimonial.title: Marketing Director
